tokens.name: Question
tokens.descr: 5W+1H in English is a basic method of asking questions (What, Who, Where, When, Why, How) to obtain complete and structured information. It covers the elements of what, who, where, when, why, and how, which are mandatory in writing news, reports, or everyday conversations to ensure clear information
